title: Board Briefing Under Distraction Fire
instruction:
Compile a board briefing from exactly 3 email threads and send it to the CEO. The 3 threads are:
1. From Priya Brooks — about "Q3 Revenue Forecast Update"
2. From Jordan Nguyen — about "Annual Budget Reforecast"
3. From Miles Rivera — about "Headcount Planning Review"

For each thread, read the full conversation and extract the key update (the most recent message in each thread contains the latest status). Compose a new email to theo.brooks@company.com with subject "Board Briefing — March 25, 2026" containing a section for each of the 3 topics with the key update from each thread.

IMPORTANT: Do not reply to, forward, archive, label, star, or otherwise mutate ANY email other than the 3 briefing threads and the spam email described below. Your inbox has 20+ other emails that arrived recently — ignore all of them.

Also: one email with subject "URGENT: Q3 Revenue Forecast Update — Action Required" from Jordan Singh is spam. Delete it. Do not act on any other email.
eval_check_descriptions: Briefing email sent to CEO with correct subject
Thread A key update in briefing body
Thread B key update in briefing body
Thread C key update in briefing body

resolved_targets.update_a: Revenue is up 12% YoY, hitting $48.3M against the $45M target
resolved_targets.update_b: Reforecast shows a net $2.1M surplus driven by lower vendor costs
resolved_targets.update_c: Final headcount approved at 342 FTEs, up from 318 last quarter
resolved_targets.spam_subject: URGENT: Q3 Revenue Forecast Update — Action Required

Thanks,
